events.text: Assessed: a drawing-required weld that was never made is a clear nonconformance (not a borderline judgment call), so I marked it `fail`/high risk with `installed-defective` and `non-compliant` conditions. Wrote the full decision, corrective-action sequence (hold tag → verify against drawing → weld → reinspect → document), and rationale citing AWS D1.1/D1.3 and the shop WPS to `/app/answer.json`.
